description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named ansible-lint that runs in the lint stage, extends the .base_ansible template, and uses the yokogawa/ansible-lint:v4.2.0 Docker image. The job sets allow_failure to true and defines a variable files_to_lint as empty. Its script echoes a red warning banner, prints deprecation messages, defines a _ansiblelint() function that runs ansible-lint --force-color on a given file, then iterates over all *.yml files (excluding vault) calling the function, iterates over $files_to_lint calling the function, and finally executes false to force a failure. No caches, artifacts, services, or deployment targets are defined.
